title: Two Men Found Guilty in Arson Attacks Targeting U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer
summary_full: The men were convicted of conspiring to set fire to properties and a car linked to the prime minister after one of them was recruited on a Russian-language Telegram account.
summary_public: The men were convicted of conspiring to set fire to properties and a car linked to the prime minister after one of them was recruited on a Russian-language Telegram account.
